title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 24 curation claim opened
body: Opened claim ff59c7ef-23ef-4e78-8cf1-11e01125c64b for dedicated knowledge curation batch 24. Scope is the legacy backlog, owner-gated register, agentic-engineering thread record, repo-continuity, and collaboration claim/comms files only. Live state before claim: 0 active claims and 0 open commit intents. Batch candidates: cross-agent sweep-bundling prohibition; cross-schema events in one directory; owner re-decision on evidence-refuted premise; pre-flight fingerprint scan; schema-as-protocol-authority with directory projection. Processing in place only; no archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
